eightgine_add_module(MODULE_NAME "cJSON"
    MODULE_SOURCES_DIR "${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/src"
    MODULE_INCLUDE_DIR "${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/include" "${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/include/cJSON"
    MODULE_DEFINITIONS PRIVATE "CJSON_HIDE_SYMBOLS"
    MODULE_TYPE STATIC
)
# eightgine_add_module(MODULE_NAME "cJSON"
#     MODULE_SOURCES_DIR "${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/src"
#     MODULE_INCLUDE_DIR "${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/include" "${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/include/cJSON"
#     MODULE_DEFINITIONS PRIVATE "CJSON_EXPORT_SYMBOLS" INTERFACE "CJSON_IMPORT_SYMBOLS"
#     # MODULE_TYPE STATIC
# )
